creator: vanitas@ma3.seikyou.ne.jp
text:
manpage doscmd.1 has 5 typos:
   287: "one the of the" -> "one of the"
   296: "it if is" -> "if it is"
   428: "will emulated" -> "will be emulated"
   453: "the the" -> "to the"
   687: "Not that" -> "Note that"

Fix: apply this patch
How-To-Repeat: 
 man 1 doscmd
